last_planning_summary: Task 155 is locking the v0.4.0 post-release state after release asset verification, curl installer verification, and install docs sync. CAP-020 records verified v0.4.0 release binary availability, verified v0.4.0 curl installer availability, install docs current-release sync, Planned / deferred Homebrew status, model workspace packs as UX rather than CLI authority, and the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary. The current turn must use ni status, apply AMEND-014, relock through the CLI, and compile .ni/generated/v0.4.0-post-release.prompt.txt without executing it.

recent_decisions.title: v0.4.0 post-release state is locked after verification
